final_prompt.prompt:
Create a detailed exploded-view technical illustration of a Sony A7 camera with all components labeled (all in-image text in Spanish).

Style/medium: needs a technical exploded-view diagram aesthetic — references in the spirit of 1960s NASA technical manuals, Haynes repair manual illustrations, 1980s Japanese camera service guides; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be exploded-view layout showing all internal and external components separated along an axis
Subject: must include Sony A7 camera and all its components (body, sensor, shutter mechanism, mirrorless mount, EVF, LCD screen, battery, SD card slot, circuit boards, screws, dials, buttons, grip, lens mount, image stabilization unit, processor, heat sink, connectors)
Scene/backdrop: must be clean technical diagram background with construction lines
Lighting/mood: needs a clear technical illustration atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a technical manual direction — exact values are yours
Materials/textures: needs a technical cutaway surface treatment — exact rendering style is yours
Text (verbatim): must include component labels in Spanish (sensor, obturador, montura E, visor electrónico, pantalla LCD, batería, tarjeta SD, placa base, tornillos, diales, botones, empuñadura, estabilizador, procesador, disipador, conectores)
Constraints: must include all in-image text in Spanish by default; must preserve Sony A7 model accuracy, all component names labeled
Avoid:
